blocks.content: Daniel blinked. Just once. It wasn't much, but it was enough to make the moment interesting.
He smiled. It wasn't a good smile.

blocks.speaker: Daniel
blocks.content: Aight, Larry. I'll figure it out.
He bumped Larry's shoulder going past — deliberate, just short of a shove. A few people in the hallway noticed. A few of them looked.

He was at the end of the hall, already there, watching. He'd seen enough to know something had happened. The way he looked at Larry wasn't concern exactly. More like calculation — the way you look at something you have to decide how much to claim.
Then he turned back to his conversation.
